subcodes.first_line: The Day mentioned in the divine Books hath appeared and the Countenance of the Promised One is manifest; yet the heedless servants remain, for the most part, turned away and in denial [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم مذکور در کتب الهی ظاهر و طلعت موعود مشهود مع ذلک عباد غافل اکثری معرض و منکر
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
